Campus Crime Update

March/April 2007
EducationData & DatabasesInvestigative Methods

The IRE and NICAR Database Library has updated its Campus Crime database, allowing public access to crime statistics reported by colleges and universities from 2001-2005, including data on on-campus and off-campus crimes, arrests, discipline, and hate crimes.

How safe are the campuses of your local colleges or universities? The IRE and NICAR Database Library recently updated the Campus Crime database so you can find out.

On October 1st of each year, schools are required to report crime statistics for the three most recent calendar years. The data cover 2001 through 2005 and contain 8,771 records for the most recent year. On campus and off-campus crime, arrests, discipline and hate crimes are reported in separate tables that can be linked. More limited information is available for 2000. For more information and sample data, visit the Database Library's Web site www.ire.org/datalibrary/databases/viewdatabase.php?dbaseindex=54.
